name: Witzel Bus Svc Inc
recent_news: Small local operator running since 1999 out of Fulda, MN; USDOT 945781 listed as inactive on one carrier-data site, but business remains active per local Fulda business directory.
fit_notes: Tiny single-family operator (~8 buses, ~$240K rev per D&B though Summit list shows higher). Too small to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in on its own; only relevant as part of a SW Minnesota roll-up.

name: Black Hawk Community Bus Inc
districts_or_customers: Carroll County School District area (Black Hawk, MS)
recent_news: Mississippi non-profit corporation registered 9/24/1970, listed in 'Good Standing'; no recent operational news found and area is served by Carroll County School District directly.
fit_notes: Likely a dormant or very small non-profit community transport entity in unincorporated rural MS, founded 1970 by local residents; not a viable tuck-in for Summit. Not a real private contractor of meaningful scale.

name: JG Us Inc Which Will Do Bus
recent_news: NOT a school bus operator. 'JG US, Inc., which will do business in California as Justgiving CA, Inc.' is a California foreign-corp filing for JustGiving (online fundraising/charitable giving platform), tied to Blackbaud HQ at Daniel Island, SC. JustGiving was acquired by Blackbaud in 2017.
fit_notes: DATA-ERROR / NOT A TARGET. Name was misparsed from a CA Statement & Designation by Foreign Corp filing ('which will do business in...'). This is JustGiving (Blackbaud subsidiary), an online donations platform — no buses, no school transport. Remove from universe.

name: Cram 101 Inc Which Will Do Bus
recent_news: NOT a school bus operator. 'Cram 101, Inc., which will do business in California as Cram 101 Opedia' is a Delaware foreign corp registered in CA on 9/1/2009. Cram101 is a textbook study-guide / outline publisher (Content Technologies, Inc.).
fit_notes: DATA-ERROR / NOT A TARGET. Name parsed from CA foreign-corp filing ('which will do business in California as ...'). Cram101 is an academic study-guide publisher, not a bus operator. Remove from universe.

name: CMR Inc Which Will Do Bus
recent_news: NOT a school bus operator. Name reflects a California Statement & Designation by Foreign Corporation filing ('CMR Inc which will do business in California as ...'); registered to a residential address on Linea Terrace in a 14-home gated community in south Palm Springs. No evidence of any school-bus operations under this entity.
fit_notes: DATA-ERROR / NOT A TARGET. Same CA foreign-corp naming artifact as the JG Us / Cram 101 entries; registered to a private home in a residential gated community. No bus fleet, no district contracts. Remove from universe.
